name: couple-no-deps-medium-col-2026
description: Couple with two earners, no dependents, US medium-cost-of-living area, 2026. Comp floors reflect a household where the JFS user's income is one of two earners; pure floors are ~85% of single-us-metro since fixed costs (housing, utilities, insurance) are shared. ADJUST if you are the dominant earner or sole earner during transitions.
